who: operations manager in a logistics company tracking productivity metrics for 50-100 employees
offer: For operations managers in a logistics company processing 50-100 employees, poor attendance tracking causes high turnover rates. We provide a workforce analytics dashboard instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Inability to effectively monitor employee productivity and attendance.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for operations managers seeking solutions
Indie Hackers posts discussing similar productivity challenges
DM outreach to operations managers with demo video links
Engage in community forums for sharing productivity tools
try_it: Let users explore real-time tracking on sample data
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the dashboard
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Create template options for frequent tasks
Allow CSV imports for existing attendance data
Streamline onboarding process for new users
